Stated Restrictions: This polygon feature class contains all lands that are owned and/or maintained by Auckland Council Community Facilities (CF) Department, and in some cases by other Council-owned and controlled organisations, that are generally parks and open spaces. These include Pocket Parks, Neighbourhood Parks, Suburb Parks, Destination Parks, Connection and Linkage Open Space, Civic Space, Conservation Open Space and Organised Sports Open Space. Also included are cemeteries, and other reserve lands that are used for stormwater, esplanade reserves, etc. The boundaries drawn in this dataset are NOT legal boundaries; rather these boundaries represent the areas or sites that Auckland Council maintains through its full facility contractors. Also, this dataset DOES NOT represent the legal status of the land, i.e. whether the land is gazetted under the Reserve Act, subject under the Local Government Act or other statutory provisions. The polygons represent the maintenance extent on the land.
